en.title: flap farm
en.subtitle: flap farm ecosystem launches its first farming GameFi experience: claim land, plant, nurture, harvest, and connect long-term farming output with the flap farm vault economy.
en.states.connectWallet: Connect wallet from the host header before sending transactions.
en.states.wrongNetwork: Switch wallet to {chain} before using flap farm.
en.states.noVault: No game instance is available in the host context yet. Please open flap farm from the launched game page.
en.states.noLand: No land yet. Buy level-1 land from the shop first.
en.notices.mechanics: Land/seed payments enter the farm reward pool; fertilizer payments are burned.
en.errors.amountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
en.errors.insufficientFunds: Insufficient wallet balance to complete this transaction.
en.errors.walletDisconnected: Connect a wallet before sending this transaction.
en.errors.simulationFailed: The transaction could not pass simulation.
en.errors.readFailed: Unable to refresh flap farm data right now.
en.notices.riskMissing: Host risk status is unavailable. This farm must be opened from a Flap host that provides the current contract risk status.
en.states.actionPhaseUnavailable: This action is not available in the current market phase.

zh.title: 蝴蝶农场
zh.subtitle:
蝴蝶农场生态再添重磅玩法——平台首款种植经营游戏今日正式上线！
作为蝴蝶农场首个农耕类GameFi产品，项目跳出传统代币发射单一模式，打造完整链上田园经营体系。玩家可领取专属土地，完成播种、养护、成熟收割全流程，所有作物、土地资产上链确权，自由流通。
游戏深度联动蝶系金库经济模型，种植产出可直接存入金库增值、销毁增值双重收益，形成「种植产出-销毁增值」闭环生态。区别于普通短线Meme玩法，种植长线经营模式带来稳定持续收益，兼顾休闲体验与资产增值。
zh.states.connectWallet: 请先在宿主页面顶部连接钱包，再发起交易。
zh.states.wrongNetwork: 请先把钱包切换到 {chain}，再使用蝴蝶农场。
zh.states.noVault: 宿主页面还没有游戏实例地址。请从已创建的蝴蝶农场页面进入。
zh.states.noLand: 暂无土地。请先在商店购买 1 级土地。
zh.notices.mechanics: 土地/种子付款进入农场奖励池；养料付款直接销毁。
zh.errors.amountRequired: 请输入大于 0 的数量。
zh.errors.insufficientFunds: 钱包余额不足，无法完成这笔交易。
zh.errors.walletDisconnected: 请先连接钱包后再发起交易。
zh.errors.userRejected: 你已取消这次钱包签名请求。
zh.errors.simulationFailed: 这笔交易没有通过模拟检查。
zh.errors.readFailed: 暂时无法刷新蝴蝶农场数据。
zh.notices.riskMissing: 宿主风险状态不可用。请从提供当前合约风险状态的 Flap 页面进入。
zh.states.actionPhaseUnavailable: 当前市场阶段暂不可执行该操作。
